title: Χαμηλός Δείκτης Μετατρεψιμότητας Τροφής FCR (Feed Convention Factor)
subtitle: BroilerNet Factsheet – Ενημερωτικό έντυπο S1-C2-4
description: A guide for implementing low feed conversion ratio practices in broiler farming through optimized feed composition. It outlines the benefits, challenges, and economic and environmental impacts of reducing the Feed Conversion Ratio (FCR).
